task_description: Phase 22: Real ML Serving - Replace naive JS-only ML implementations with production Triton Inference Server client, real feature store pipeline, hybrid search with vector+BM25+reranker, A/B framework with guardrails, on-device ranker, and user agency microfeatures (why am I seeing this, show me less, time well spent, following mode, reset recommendations).

verification.summary: All 5 packages typecheck, test (504 total tests), build, and lint cleanly. 9 triton-client tests, 95 ml-pipeline tests, 214 search tests, 114 recommendations tests, 75 ranking tests. All new tests exercise real code paths with DI-mocked dependencies.
